notes: IA-64 processor; released July 2002; final shipments July 2021; failed to capture mainstream server market
HP's high-end server line; transitioned from Itanium to x86 Xeon processors; still sold by HPE
IBM relational database; cited in TPC benchmarks; active as Db2 in 2026
SAP's flagship ERP; superseded by SAP ECC then S/4HANA; R/3 end of mainstream maintenance ~2015
Online transaction processing benchmark standard; still maintained by TPC
Decision support benchmark; still maintained; TPC-DS is more modern successor
